body.title: CLOSED: rackmount test object (RackTestDevice/RackTestShim)
body.result: RackTestDevice+RackTestShim: SIMULATED/REAL modes, call recording, failure injection, assertion helpers, 127 contract+unit tests pass
body.description:
Create a test fixture device in agent_datacenter: a BaseDevice subclass that can either simulate the rack (for shim unit tests without real hardware) or wire into a real rack. Instrumented for all rackmount testing scenarios — records all calls, exposes assertion helpers, implements the full device protocol so shim tests can exercise tool-invocation paths without a live device.

Needs both a SimulatedRack mode (pure in-process, controllable from tests) and a RealRack adapter mode (thin wrapper that passes through to actual rack hardware). The shim and its tools should be testable against either mode via a single interface.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/devices/ (new test device), agent_datacenter/shim.py (interface contract), agent_datacenter/device.py (BaseDevice)
**Design rules:** OOP-first (BaseDevice subclass per CLAUDE.md); no SQLite; no TheIgors imports
**Scope boundary:** test fixture only — no production device logic; SimulatedRack + RealRack adapter + assertion helpers. No new shim features.
**Test plan:** unit tests for shim tool invocation against SimulatedRack; confirm same tests pass against RealRack adapter (integration)
